name: home23
description: Installable AI operating system — persistent agents with living brains

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/agent/brain-operations-client.test.ts tests/agent/brain-route-resolver.test.ts tests/agent/chat-turn-images.test.ts tests/agent/context-brain-retrieval.test.ts tests/agent/context-worker-runs.test.ts tests/agent/good-life-identity.test.ts tests/agent/history-image-persistence.test.ts tests/agent/memory-compaction.test.ts tests/agent/neighbor-state.test.ts tests/agent/text-generation.test.ts tests/agent/tool-result.test.ts tests/agent/tool-result-provider-branches.test.ts tests/agent/tools/brain.test.ts tests/agent/tools/cron.test.ts tests/agent/tools/research.test.ts tests/agent/tools/shell.test.ts tests/agent/tools/workers.test.ts tests/agent/turn-activity-lease.test.ts tests/agent/turn-entrypoint-callers.test.ts tests/agent/turn-entrypoints.test.ts tests/agent/verification.test.ts tests/dashboard/chat-state.test.ts tests/scheduler/*.test.ts tests/workers/*.test.ts && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/cosmo23/brain-operation-runtime.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/brain-operation-worker.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/codex-responses-client.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/provider-input-boundaries.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/provider-pair-probe.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/mcp-http-loopback.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/cross-brain-readonly.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/pgs-cancellation.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/pgs-retry-state.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/pgs-source-pin.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/pinned-pgs-store.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/pinned-query-projection.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/query-engine-mutation-boundary.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/query-engine-runtime.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/query-engine-source-pin.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/bounded-json.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/cluster-aware-memory-persistence.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/cluster-snapshot-merger-parity.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/legacy-query-operation-adapter.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/network-memory-embedding-batch.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/query-engine-provider-ownership.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/package-test-registration.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/research-run-operation-adapter.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/research-pinned-source-reader.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/research-requester-output-writer.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/research-compile-provider-adapter.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/research-operation-executors.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/agent-executor-memory-context.test.cjs tests/shared/memory-source-pin.test.js tests/shared/memory-source-scratch-quota.test.js tests/shared/memory-source-legacy-migration.test.js && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/dashboard/yaml-write-safety.test.js tests/dashboard/operator-ui.test.js && node --test --test-concurrency=1 'tests/cli/**/*.test.js' && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/engine/dashboard/brain-operation-routes.test.js tests/engine/agents/agent-executor-memory-context.test.js tests/engine/core/brain-backups.test.cjs tests/engine/core/memory-sidecar.test.cjs 'tests/engine/**/*.test.js' && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/scripts/live-brain-tools-smoke.test.cjs tests/scripts/hash-brain-boundaries.test.cjs tests/scripts/sample-process-memory.test.cjs tests/scripts/verify-brain-persistence.test.cjs tests/scripts/guarded-pm2-save.test.cjs tests/scripts/cleanup-orphan-brain-projections.test.cjs tests/scripts/verify-live-deployment-tree.test.cjs tests/scripts/list-brain-operations.test.cjs tests/scripts/migrate-legacy-brain.test.cjs tests/scripts/rebuild-ann-indexes.test.cjs tests/shared/runtime-metrics-route.test.cjs && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/engine/dashboard/legacy-memory-route.test.cjs
scripts.pm2:restart: node cli/home23.js stop && node cli/home23.js start
